response.justification: Bogdan has over 12 years of full-stack experience with deep proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools like AWS CDK, aligning strongly with the required stack. His work on AI-agent infrastructure, testing frameworks, and scalable systems demonstrates the architectural and cross-stack expertise needed. His open-source contributions and teaching reflect strong communication and engineering rigor, though his German language skills are basic, which may slightly impact local collaboration.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms
Proven track record in AI-agent development and scalable automation systems
Strong advocacy for testing, CI/CD, and engineering best practices through open-source and workshops
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, potentially limiting local team integration
Resume lists DLang and Java heavily; may raise questions about recent focus on required stack (Nest.js, Vitest)
Current role at Naver starts in April 2025 (future-dated), raising minor timeline ambiguity
